ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Series table */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "game_genre" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Game Genres table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_genre FOREIGN KEY ("game_genre") REFERENCES game_genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text analysis record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Games table */,
  "folder" TEXT /* Folder location of the text data */,
  "alternative_measure" INTEGER /* Alternative measurement indicator */,
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Text Types table */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Groups table */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Characters table */,
  "lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the text */,
  "words" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the text */,
  "sentences" INTEGER /* Total number of sentences in the text */,
  "syllables" INTEGER /* Total number of syllables in the text */,
  "flesch_kincaid" REAL /* Flesch-Kincaid readability score */,
  "flesch_readability" REAL /* Flesch readability score */,
  "dale_chall_readability" REAL /* Dale-Chall readability score */,
  "num_characters" INTEGER /* Total number of characters in the text */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the text analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_text_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_type_id") REFERENCES text_types ("text_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the game series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game series */,
  "series_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., writer, analyst, developer) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text analysis being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the analysis */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the analysis */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES text_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_types" (
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text type */,
  "text_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the text type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_series_genres" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Series table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Game Genres table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "genre_id")
)
